summary: 10k Science combines the Viewer, AI Guides, spoken student responses, and the Educator Dashboard into a formative assessment loop. Students explore immersive 3D science environments, AI Guides prompt observation and explanation, students respond verbally, AI supports scoring and real-time feedback, and educators use dashboard insights to identify where students understand key concepts or need support. Educators can start a free trial account for the web platform to try the browser-based viewer and Educator Dashboard.
